## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new design hire Katia Pembayun, discuss company vision, and explore design opportunities at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX operates as a portfolio of interconnected ventures (service, AI/tech, expert layers) rather than a single brand/product](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Company culture emphasizes authenticity, vulnerability, and breaking conventional rules to drive innovation](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Design focus: Create reusable components and streamlined workflows while maintaining creativity and quality](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Opportunity to develop visual systems for mental models/frameworks to enhance content across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Vision

  - [Three-layer model: service, AI/technology (workflow), and expert layers](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Aiming to build a portfolio of incubated ventures, similar to Tiny (owns Dribbble, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Focus on building a common core and community, not tied to a single brand](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Emphasis on authenticity, vulnerability, and human connection in marketing and community building](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Design Philosophy and Approach

  - [Balance between systemization and creativity](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Create reusable components and guardrails while allowing for creative flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Streamline workflows (80%) to focus more on expertise and creative input (20%)](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [Utilize mood boarding and archetype creation for brand and content development](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Explore AI-assisted tagging and database creation for efficient mood board generation](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

### Content Creation and Visual Systems

  - [Develop visual language for mental models and frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Create easily adaptable templates for social posts, article enrichment, and client deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Ensure consistency across various content types (social, articles, videos)](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Example: Splatch PMM's simple yet effective visual style for communicating concepts](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

### Katia's Motivation and Background

  - [Transitioning from traditional agency work to AI-integrated creative processes](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Seeking opportunities to learn and incorporate new tools into workflow](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Attracted to GrowthX's unique position between agency and tech startup](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Collaborate with Rand to prioritize design projects and allocate time effectively](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Develop a process for translating mental models/ideas into visual charts and frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Explore ways to create adaptable visual systems for both internal and client use](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Begin working on streamlining design workflows, focusing on the 80% that can be systematized](https://fathom.video/share/bnhUvTHyh8bsEBSEAofwVmt3owEQuKA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
